payload_shape_summary.intent: Saved phases now include intent.objective, intent.role, and intent.intake projected from the existing editor draft fields.
payload_shape_summary.contract: Saved phases now include contract.instructions, contract.executionRules, contract.actionPolicy, and contract.transitionAuthority while preserving existing compatibility flat fields.
payload_shape_summary.evidencePolicy: Saved phases now include evidencePolicy.outputArtifact, evidencePolicy.requiredArtifacts, evidencePolicy.completionCriteria, and evidencePolicy.handoffRules.
payload_shape_summary.runtimeState: Session-owned phase runtimeState is removed from saved template phase data before the phase object is returned.

ui_grouping_summary: WorkflowTemplateEditor renders accessible role=group sections named Intent, Contract, and Evidence Policy.
The existing Recommended Skills group remains present and keeps the existing catalog picker workflow.
No runtime execution controls, manual completion controls, auto-run affordances, or tutorial/marketing copy were added.

validation_evidence.result: Passed. 1 test file passed, 47 tests passed.
details: T003 RED tests now pass: grouped sections render, save payload contains grouped intent/contract/evidencePolicy objects, and runtimeState is excluded.
Existing WorkflowComponents tests in the file still pass.
Vitest emitted existing React act() warnings for WorkflowTemplateEditor async store updates; warnings did not fail the suite.

validation_evidence.result: Nonzero due to an existing out-of-scope test type issue in desktop/src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx.
details: Only reported error after the T005 type fixes: src/components/workflow/WorkflowComponents.test.tsx(55,14): File '@testing-library/jest-dom/types/index.d.ts' is not a module.
No type errors were reported for modified T005 production or locale files.
The failing file is explicitly outside T005 write scope, so it was not edited.

validation_evidence.result: Passed with Git line-ending warnings only.

MP-001.evidence: The editor now authors and saves structured phase execution contract objects rather than cosmetic-only labels: intent, contract, evidencePolicy, actionPolicy, transitionAuthority, completionCriteria, and handoffRules are material payload fields.

MP-003.evidence: Template-owned intent/contract/evidencePolicy are authored separately from session-owned runtimeState, and runtimeState is stripped from saved phase data.

MP-010.evidence: The patch did not add runtime controls to WorkflowTemplateEditor; it only reorganized authoring fields and preserved the existing Recommended Skills selector.

CA-008.evidence: Testing Library assertions now pass for accessible editor groups named Intent, Contract, Evidence Policy, and Recommended skills for Plan phase, and the save payload distinguishes grouped authoring state from runtime-owned state.

blockers.summary: Full desktop lint is blocked by an existing test-file type import issue outside T005 write scope.
blockers.evidence: cd desktop; bun run lint exits 1 with only WorkflowComponents.test.tsx(55,14): '@testing-library/jest-dom/types/index.d.ts' is not a module.
blockers.unblock_criteria: Fix the out-of-scope test import/type setup in a task that allows editing WorkflowComponents.test.tsx, then rerun cd desktop; bun run lint.

failed_assumptions: Desktop lint would be clean after fixing T005 production type errors; it is still blocked by an existing out-of-scope test type error.
recovery_guidance: Proceed to T006 with the required T005 validation command green.
If full desktop typecheck is required at the join point, resolve the existing WorkflowComponents.test.tsx jest-dom type import issue in an allowed task before rerunning cd desktop; bun run lint.
Keep future editor changes preserving grouped payload objects and stripping runtimeState from template saves.
